channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3122] sanity 56w: ldlm_resource_get(): lvbo_init failed for resource 1745: rc -2
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Li Wei <liwei@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/9130feb8-9fcb-11e2-9f27-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_56w failed with the following error:

/usr/bin/lfs getstripe -c /mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/file2 wrong: found 7, expected 6

Info required for matching: sanity 56w

== sanity test 56w: check lfs_migrate -c stripe_count works == 08:45:26 (1365349526)
/usr/bin/lfs_migrate -y -c 6 /mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/file1
/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/file1: done
/usr/bin/lfs_migrate -y -c 6 /mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/dir1
/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/dir1/file3: done
/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/dir1/file1: done
/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/dir1/file2: done
/usr/bin/lfs find -stripe_count 7 -type f /mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w |
/usr/bin/lfs_migrate -y -c 6
error: cb_find_init: lstat failedfor /mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/dir1/file3: Cannot allocate memory (12)
error: find failed for /mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w.
/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/dir3/file3: done
/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/dir3/file1: done
/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/dir3/file2: done
/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/dir2/file3: done
/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/dir2/file1: done
/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/dir2/file2: done
/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/file3: done
sanity test_56w: @@@@@@ FAIL: /usr/bin/lfs getstripe -c /mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/file2 wrong: found 7, expected 6
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4103:error_noexit()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4126:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:4341:check_stripe_count()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:4414:test_56w()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4380:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4413:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4268:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:4422:main()
Dumping lctl log to /logdir/test_logs/2013-04-07/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-review-1_2_1_14504_-69826007343620-074150/sanity.test_56w.*.1365349545.log
CMD: client-20-ib,client-21-ib,client-22-ib,client-23-ib.lab.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /logdir/test_logs/2013-04-07/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-review-1_2_1_14504_-69826007343620-074150/sanity.test_56w.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1365349545.log;
dmesg > /logdir/test_logs/2013-04-07/lustre-reviews-el6-x86_64-review-1_2_1_14504_-69826007343620-074150/sanity.test_56w.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1365349545.log

From the OSS console:

08:45:27:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 56w: check lfs_migrate -c stripe_count works == 08:45:26 (1365349526)
08:45:39:LustreError: 7117:0:(ldlm_resource.c:1171:ldlm_resource_get()) lvbo_init failed for resource 1745: rc -2
08:45:39:LustreError: 7117:0:(ldlm_resource.c:1171:ldlm_resource_get()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
08:45:39:LustreError: 28462:0:(ldlm_resource.c:1171:ldlm_resource_get()) lvbo_init failed for resource 848: rc -2
08:45:39:LustreError: 28462:0:(ldlm_resource.c:1171:ldlm_resource_get()) Skipped 1 previous similar message

This issue caused the later 56ic to fail as well. According to 56ic's debug log, the -ENOENTs likely came from ofd_attr_get()'s "else" block.
item.summary: sanity 56w: ldlm_resource_get(): lvbo_init failed for resource 1745: rc -2

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment: Duplicate of LU-3057
Definitely, I got such/same auto-test failures and as explained in LU-3092 I rebased on top of LU-3057 changes and everything run fine then.

error: cb_find_init: lstat failedfor /mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w/dir1/file3: Cannot allocate memory (12)
error: find failed for /mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d56w.

Looks like LU-3092.
